summary: Added --search and --task N modes to /literature command and skill-literature. Implemented 7-step search handler (Zotero library lookup + Literature/ index cross-reference + multi-select AskUserQuestion with [IMPORTED]/[PDF AVAILABLE]/[NO PDF] tags) and 5-step import pipeline (PDF symlink + handle_convert with PREFILL vars + jq index patch + git commit). Updated literature-agent.md with Zotero Integration section and exit-code contract table. All 6 files verified IDENTICAL between extension source and core installed locations.
